mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, p."PRODUCT_TITLE" AS productName,
CASE WHEN c."BUYER_NUM" = #{memberNum} THEN seller."MEMBER_ID" ELSE buyer."MEMBER_ID" END AS otherName,
mp."FILE_NAME" AS otherProfileImage
FROM "TB_PRODUCTCHAT" c
JOIN "TB_PRODUCT" p ON c."PRODUCT_NUM" = p."PRODUCT_NUM"
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" buyer ON c."BUYER_NUM" = buyer."MEMBER_NUM"
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" seller ON c."SELLER_NUM" = seller."MEMBER_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "MEMBER_PROFILE" mp ON mp."MEMBER_NUM" = CASE WHEN c."BUYER_NUM" = #{memberNum} THEN c."SELLER_NUM" ELSE c."BUYER_NUM" END
WHERE c."BUYER_NUM" = #{memberNum} OR c."SELLER_NUM" = #{memberNum}
ORDER BY c."CREATETIME" DESC

SELECT m.*, m."SENDER_NUM", u."MEMBER_ID" AS senderName FROM "TB_PRODUCTMESSAGE" m JOIN "TB_MEMBER" u ON m."SENDER_NUM" = u."MEMBER_NUM" WHERE m."CHATROOM_NUM" = #{chatroomNum} ORDER BY m."CREATETIME" ASC
